name: Foday Musa Suso
abstract: Foday Musa Suso (18 February 1950 – 25 May 2025) was a Gambian musician and composer.

about_quotes.speaker: Jack DeJohnette
about_quotes.evidence: We spent two days getting the music together... we recorded what came out to be Hearts Of The Masters here in my studio. Later we did some touring... We still have an association to this day.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jack DeJohnette — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
